description: Process the Sentinel-2 RGB GeoTIFF at ~/snap_data/sentinel2_b432.tif (band_1: Red, band_2: Green, band_3: Blue) in ESA SNAP. Create a virtual band named 'water_mask' using the expression 'band_1 < 50 ? 1 : 0' and a virtual band named 'relative_depth' using the expression 'if water_mask == 1 then (log(band_3 + 1.0) / log(band_2 + 1.0)) else NaN'. Save the enriched product in BEAM-DIMAP format to ~/snap_exports/sdb_bathymetry.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to ~/snap_exports/sdb_bathymetry.tif.

metadata.log_ratio_expr: if water_mask == 1 then (log(band_3 + 1.0) / log(band_2 + 1.0)) else NaN
